name: Loop Kingdom
short_description: Loop Kingdom is a game focused on selling veteran fighters and hiring new ones.... while improving your market and keep searching for that legendary fighter that will take you to floor 200 or 400....
detailed_description:
INFO


Loop Kingdom is another idle game that plays like my other games... I am meanwhile working on 2 enourmous gigantic projects... They are Anvillage and Dungeons and Raids... so I decided to make a new IDLER for you guys while we wait right?

Am trying something different now.. I made a Gladiator-Knight twist fantasy game ... with battle animations... I am also planing on expanding it a bit more... Just wanted the storepage up and running meanwhile...

ABOUT THIS GAME


Loop Kingdom is a game focused on selling veteran fighters and hiring new ones.... while improving your market and keep searching for that legendary fighter that will take you to floor 200 or 400....

THIS GAME IS PLAYED WHILE BEING AFK => IDLE GAMES.

If you dont like idlers .. there is no need to be here.. if you wanna give it a chance , you will honor me =D!

FEATURES

  • A market where you can always hire new and best fighters...
  • A charming endless arena... =)
  • Animated Fighters.
  • Sell veteran fighters
  • Improve your market and hire better mercs!
  • Pixel hand drawn graphics!
  • A charming blueish and coolish atmosphere...
